# Wallet Key Validator Kit

Canonical source: https://github.com/devdasx/wallet-key-validator-kit

Node package and CLI for wallet-key validation:

- npm package: `wallet-key-validator-kit`
- CLI: `walletkeycheck`
- API: `validateWalletKey(value, { chain })`

Validates BIP-39 mnemonics, secp256k1 private keys, Solana ed25519 private-key inputs, WIF private keys, and BIP32/SLIP132 extended keys including xpub/xprv, ypub/yprv, zpub/zprv, tpub/tprv, upub/uprv, vpub/vprv, Ltub/Ltpv, Mtub/Mtpv.

Validate:

```bash
npm test
examples/run-examples.sh
```
